summary: Delete pipeline template stage and move placements to given destination stage
description: Delete pipeline template stage and move placements to given destination stage. Endpoint: DELETE /c/{company_id}/offer_templates/{offer_template_id}/pipeline_templates/stages/. Required parameters: offer_template_id, source_template_id, company_id.
example_request:
DELETE /c/{company_id}/offer_templates/{offer_template_id}/pipeline_templates/stages/

Required params: offer_template_id, source_template_id, company_id
